purpose: Small decoupled optimization: moment-match ADPretrain projected residual cache to original DRA feature cache using train/good scalar mean/std per scale, then run AHL on one class.
moment_rule: For each scale, use train/good only: x_out=(x-src_mean)/(src_std+eps)*ref_std+ref_mean. Apply same scalar affine transform to train/test npy files.
runtime_change: torch.backends.cudnn.enabled = False before running AHL main.py
